allow: Bash(python -c "import importlib; [print\(m, '->', \(importlib.import_module\(m\).__version__ if importlib.util.find_spec\(m\) else 'MISSING'\)\) for m in ['numpy','pandas','sklearn','lightgbm','xgboost','torch','yfinance']]")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, AdapterRAM, DriverVersion | Format-List; "=== RAM \(GB\) ==="; [math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem\).TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1\); "=== CPU ==="; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor\).Name)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install numpy pandas scikit-learn lightgbm yfinance optuna pyarrow joblib tqdm)
